banner: 100% Free · 8 Phases · 40+ Resources · $0 Cost · Zero Paywalls
subtitle: A complete, self–paced path from financial foundations to production fintech engineer — 8 phases, 40+ hand–curated free resources, dual General & Healthcare tracks, a 16–month study schedule, and career prep. $0 cost. No paywalls. No compromises.

resources.name: Yale Financial Markets (Coursera)
resources.meta: coursera.org · Free audit, Robert Shiller’s finance course

resources.name: Coursera Introduction to Fintech (University of Michigan)

general.title: Financial Dashboard
general.desc: Build a personal finance dashboard tracking income, expenses, investments, and net worth with interactive charts and budgeting features.

healthcare.title: Healthcare Payment Tracker
healthcare.desc: Build a system that tracks medical expenses, insurance claims, out–of–pocket costs, and generates FSA/HSA contribution reports.

general.title: Investment Calculator Suite
general.desc: Build a suite of financial calculators: compound interest, mortgage, retirement planning, and investment portfolio analyzer with real–time market data.

healthcare.title: Medical Cost Estimator
healthcare.desc: Build a tool that estimates medical procedure costs, compares insurance plans, calculates deductible tracking, and projects annual healthcare spending.

general.title: Personal Finance CLI
general.desc: A command–line tool that tracks expenses, categorises transactions, generates monthly budget reports, and projects savings goals using financial math formulas.

healthcare.title: Healthcare Expense Tracker
healthcare.desc: A CLI tool that categorises medical expenses, tracks insurance claims, calculates FSA/HSA contributions, and generates end–of–year healthcare spending reports.

general.title: Stock Portfolio Tracker
general.desc: Build a React app that tracks stock holdings, displays real–time prices, shows portfolio performance, and generates dividend reports.

healthcare.title: Health Insurance Comparison Tool
healthcare.desc: Build a React app that compares health insurance plans, calculates premiums, shows coverage details, and tracks claims.

general.title: Market Data API
general.desc: Build a REST API serving stock prices, historical data, and financial news with rate limiting, caching, and WebSocket streaming.

healthcare.title: Insurance Claims API
healthcare.desc: Build a REST API for submitting, tracking, and processing insurance claims with validation, status tracking, and document attachments.

general.title: Fintech Web App Starter
general.desc: A full–stack fintech starter kit with React frontend, FastAPI backend, Redis caching, WebSocket real–time updates, and PostgreSQL database with financial data models.

healthcare.title: Healthcare Fintech Starter
healthcare.desc: A full–stack healthcare fintech starter with React frontend, FastAPI backend, insurance claims processing, and HIPAA–compliant data storage.

resources.name: Stripe Documentation
resources.meta: stripe.com/docs · Free comprehensive payment integration docs

general.title: Payment Processing System
general.desc: Build a payment system integrating Stripe for card payments, including checkout, refunds, subscription billing, and reconciliation.

healthcare.title: Patient Payment Portal
healthcare.desc: Build a patient–facing payment portal for medical bills with payment plans, insurance copay processing, and HSA/FSA payment options.

resources.name: Google Pay API
resources.meta: developers.google.com · Free Google Pay integration docs

general.title: Digital Wallet App
general.desc: Build a digital wallet with balance management, peer–to–peer transfers, QR code payments, and transaction history.

healthcare.title: Health Savings Wallet
healthcare.desc: Build a specialized wallet for health savings with HSA/FSA integration, medical expense categorization, receipt scanning, and tax reporting.

general.title: Payment Gateway MVP
general.desc: A payment gateway MVP with Stripe checkout, refund processing, subscription management, payment reconciliation dashboard, and webhook handling.

healthcare.title: Medical Billing Payment System
healthcare.desc: A healthcare payment system handling patient billing, insurance copays, HSA/FSA payments, payment plans, and automated reconciliation with insurance providers.

resources.name: CryptoZombies
resources.meta: cryptozombies.io · Free interactive blockchain coding course

general.title: Blockchain Transaction Explorer
general.desc: Build a blockchain explorer that visualizes transactions, blocks, gas fees, and wallet balances on Ethereum testnet.

healthcare.title: Medical Records Blockchain
healthcare.desc: Build a proof–of–concept for storing medical record hashes on blockchain for integrity verification with off–chain storage.

resources.name: OpenZeppelin Contracts
resources.meta: openzeppelin.com · Free audited smart contract library

general.title: Token Launch Platform
general.desc: Build an ERC–20 token creation platform with tokenomics configuration, distribution schedule, and basic DEX trading.

healthcare.title: Healthcare Token System
healthcare.desc: Build a token–based system for patient health data sharing consent with smart contracts governing access permissions.

general.title: DeFi Dashboard
general.desc: A DeFi dashboard that connects to Ethereum wallets, displays token balances, tracks DeFi positions (lending/borrowing), and visualises gas costs.

healthcare.title: Healthcare Consent DApp
healthcare.desc: A decentralized application for managing patient consent for health data sharing using blockchain–based smart contracts with audit trails.

resources.name: Yahoo Finance API (yfinance)
resources.meta: pypi.org · Free Python financial data library

resources.name: Kaggle Financial Datasets
resources.meta: kaggle.com · Free financial data for analysis

general.title: Algorithmic Trading Bot
general.desc: Build a backtesting framework with technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands) and paper trading simulation.

healthcare.title: Healthcare Stock Analysis
healthcare.desc: Analyze healthcare/pharma stock performance against clinical trial outcomes, FDA approvals, and market trends.

resources.name: Scikit–learn Documentation
resources.meta: scikit–learn.org · Free ML library for risk models

resources.name: Kaggle Fraud Detection
resources.meta: kaggle.com · Free fraud detection datasets and competitions

general.title: Credit Risk Assessment Tool
general.desc: Build a credit scoring model using ML with features like payment history, credit utilization, and debt–to–income ratio.

healthcare.title: Healthcare Fraud Detection
healthcare.desc: Build a fraud detection system for insurance claims using anomaly detection and claims pattern analysis.

general.title: Financial Analytics Platform
general.desc: A comprehensive financial analytics platform with market data ingestion, technical analysis, credit risk scoring, and interactive dashboards.

healthcare.title: Healthcare Financial Analytics
healthcare.desc: A healthcare financial analytics platform tracking insurance claim patterns, fraud detection, healthcare cost trends, and provider payment analytics.

general.title: KYC/AML Compliance System
general.desc: Build a KYC verification pipeline with document validation, sanctions screening, and transaction monitoring for AML compliance.

healthcare.title: Healthcare Identity Verification
healthcare.desc: Build a patient identity verification system for telehealth with KYC principles, insurance verification, and HIPAA–compliant identity management.

general.title: Secure Payment Gateway
general.desc: Build a PCI–compliant payment gateway with tokenization, 3D Secure, fraud detection, and comprehensive audit logging.

healthcare.title: Secure Health Payment System
healthcare.desc: Build a HIPAA–compliant payment system for healthcare with PHI–safe transaction handling, insurance payment processing, and audit trails.

general.title: Fintech Security Suite
general.desc: A comprehensive fintech security suite with KYC verification, AML monitoring, API security hardening, encryption utilities, and audit logging dashboard.

healthcare.title: Healthcare Compliance Platform
healthcare.desc: A HIPAA–compliant platform with patient identity verification, PHI encryption, audit trails, insurance verification, and regulatory reporting.

general.title: Neobank MVP
general.desc: Build a mobile banking app with account management, P2P transfers, budgeting tools, and investment tracking.

healthcare.title: Health Savings Neobank
healthcare.desc: Build a specialized banking app for healthcare savings with HSA/FSA management, medical bill payment, and healthcare expense categorization.

general.title: P2P Lending Platform
general.desc: Build a peer–to–peer lending marketplace with loan listings, credit scoring, interest rate calculation, and payment scheduling.

healthcare.title: Medical Financing Platform
healthcare.desc: Build a healthcare financing platform with medical loan offerings, payment plans for procedures, and insurance claim financing.

general.title: Neobank Full–Stack MVP
general.desc: A full–stack neobank MVP with account management via Plaid, P2P transfers, budgeting tools, investment tracking, and a lending module.

healthcare.title: Health Savings Banking Platform
healthcare.desc: A healthcare banking platform with HSA/FSA account management, medical bill payments, insurance copay processing, and healthcare expense tracking.

general.title: Fintech Portfolio Site
general.desc: Build a portfolio site showcasing all Phase 1–7 fintech projects with live demos, API documentation, and technical blog posts.

healthcare.title: Healthcare Fintech Portfolio
healthcare.desc: A portfolio focused on healthcare payment systems, medical billing, insurance processing, and health savings products.

general.title: Fintech Engineer Career Launch
general.desc: Complete career launch with portfolio, 3 fintech certifications studied, 5 system design exercises, and applications to 20+ fintech roles.

healthcare.title: Healthcare Fintech Career Launch
healthcare.desc: Career launch focused on healthcare fintech roles with medical billing expertise, insurance processing portfolio, and applications to health–tech fintech positions.

general.title: Fintech Engineer Career Launch
general.desc: Complete career launch with portfolio site, fintech project documentation, system design exercises, and targeted applications to fintech engineering roles.

healthcare.title: Healthcare Fintech Career Launch
healthcare.desc: Career launch focused on healthcare fintech with medical billing portfolio, insurance processing demos, and targeted applications to health–tech fintech roles.

general.title: Fintech Engineering Portfolio
general.desc: A comprehensive portfolio showcasing payment systems, blockchain applications, financial data analytics, and fintech security projects with a professional blog documenting your fintech engineering journey.

healthcare.title: Healthcare Payment Platform
healthcare.desc: A production healthcare payment platform with insurance processing, patient billing, HSA/FSA integration, and HIPAA–compliant payment handling.
